text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Woo! I am feeling great aftergetting that time off!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Starting today, I'm gonna pour all of<n>my energy
back into watching Umas<n>again! Weee! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
It looks like Agnes Digital got a good<n>rest and
replenished her energy!
